title: Sinkplaataartappels (Griddle Potatoes)
excerpt: SINKPLAATAARTAPPELS Ingredients 800 g baby potatoes, rinsed • 80 ml flavourful garlic butter (or more, if you're feeling it) • 4 spring onions, finely chopped with the green stalk and all • 15 ml lemon zest strips • 45 ml lemon juice • Salt and pepper • 2 – 3 wheels feta cheese, cut into 2 …
html:
SINKPLAATAARTAPPELS

Ingredients

  • 800 g baby potatoes, rinsed
    • 80 ml flavourful garlic butter (or more, if you're feeling it)
    • 4 spring onions, finely chopped with the green stalk and all
    • 15 ml lemon zest strips
    • 45 ml lemon juice
    • Salt and pepper
    • 2 – 3 wheels feta cheese, cut into 2 cm blocks or broken up

Method

  1. Cook the potatoes in a pot of salted water until nice and soft. Drain and put back in the pot.
    2. Add the garlic butter and spring onions and, over high heat, let the butter melt.
  2. Fry until the spring onions turn slightly glossy.
    3. Add the lemon strips and juice and, with a fork, roughly break up the potatoes with the fork.
    4. Season to taste and gently stir the feta through (you want the cheese to stay in larger pieces.)
  3. Spoon into a pretty bowl and serve.
